name: h2-h3-multiplex-lab
description: Interactive, zero-dependency lab that visually compares how the same page assets load under HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 (QUIC) - multiplexing, connection limits, head-of-line blocking and stream prioritization.
author: Network Priority
//start: No runtime dependencies. Open index.html directly, or serve statically with 'npm start' (python3) or 'npx --yes serve'.
